economic_notes: South Beach Casino Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method; $1,000,000 casino income distribution received during year. Pauingassi First Nation Construction Inc. also accounted for by modified equity method. Nation operates Gas Bar & Store.
notes: Consolidated entity includes 7 fully consolidated entities (Operating Fund, Housing Authority, Care Home, Educational Authority Inc., Health Authority, Gas Bar & Store, 10178309 Manitoba Inc.) and 2 entities under modified equity method (South Beach Casino LP, Pauingassi First Nation Construction Inc.). South Beach Casino LP distributed $1,000,000 during the year. Nation is in Manitoba. No schedule of remuneration included in the extracted text. Training and employment segment ($549,454 expenses) included under expenses_infrastructure as a proxy since no direct mapping; Capital and Housing used for expenses_housing. Band Funds segment expenses of $4,479,903 not mapped to a specific category. Long-term debt increased slightly year-over-year despite repayments due to new proceeds of $518,652.
